heading: Omitted
label: 872 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized per capita distributions to tribal members from funds appropriated for a certain judgment against the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 85–395, § 272 Stat. 105May 9, 1958
